label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let me try to figure this out. The question is asking where the father and daughter were when the disaster happened. The options are A, B, C, D. Looking at the passage, it says that the father, Makoto, picked up his daughter from a school where she was being looked after while he was at work. Then he called his family to say his truck was stuck in snow and he and his daughter would walk the remaining kilometers. They were found 300 meters from the truck. So, the key points here are that he picked her up from school, the truck was stuck, and they were walking home. The school was where the daughter was being looked after while he worked. So the disaster happened when they were on their way home from the school. Option D says "on their way home from the girl's school," which
